context-mode.description: Context window optimization and session continuity — indexes tool output into a searchable knowledge base to prevent context overflow

playwright.description: Browser automation via accessibility tree — used for E2E testing and UI validation via the geosim-playwright skill

supabase.description: Supabase database and auth management — schema inspection, query execution, migration review

github.description: GitHub issues, PRs, and repository management — used by pick-issue, create-sprint-issues, and review-pr skills

vercel.description: Vercel deployment management — deployment status, preview URLs, environment variable inspection

_note: Three additional Claude Code plugin integrations (frontend-design, superpowers, claude-md-management) are configured via settings.json enabledPlugins. These are Anthropic-internal Claude Code plugins with no standalone MCP server package — they are activated through the Claude Code plugin ecosystem, not via this file.
